[http://www.nitrado.net Nitrado] |created= |disbanded= |trades= }}{{TOCRWI}} == Overview == Gamehoppers.eu is an organization that currently sponsors a League of Legends and a Counter Strike: Global Offensive team. == History == ===Formation of Gamehoppers eu=== Gamehoppers first started their foray into League of Legends May 5, 2012, after acquiring the roster of MyrMiDons consisting of [[Broetoe]], [[fluumis]], joelicious, [[MrRalleZ]], and Raistlin. On June 1, starting member Raistlin would be replaced by [[J0HNNY]]. Gamehoppers would undergo more roster changes a few weeks later, with joelicious being replaced by [[Kikis]], while [[HawkDon RV]] would join the team to fill in for J0HNNY, who became inactive. Not long after joining the team, Kikis would leave on July 16. Two weeks later, Gamehoppers would pick up top lane player El Muppo to fill the fifth spot on the roster. == Timeline == {{TDRight |name1=2012}} {{TDRight|tab}} *May 5, gamehoppers.eu acquires players of MyrMiDons: [[Broetoe]], [[fluumis]], [[joelicious]], [[MrRalleZ]], and [[Raistlin]]. [[Praec]] joins as Manager.[http://gamehoppers.eu/content/new-team-league-legends The new team: League of Legends]''"gamehoppers.eu"'' *June 1, [[Raistlin]] is replaced by [[J0HNNY]].[http://gamehoppers.eu/content/new-ap-mid A new AP mid]''"gamehoppers.eu"'' *June 29, [[joelicious]] is replaced by [[Kikis]], [[HawkDon RV]] joins while [[J0HNNY]] becomes inactive.[http://gamehoppers.eu/content/further-changes-lineup Further changes in the lineup]''"gamehoppers.eu"'' *July 16, [[Kikis]] leaves. *July 30, [[El Muppo]] joins.[http://gamehoppers.eu/content/el-muppo-joins-family El muppo joins the family]''"gamehoppers.eu"'' * August 17, [[Praec]] leaves managerial role.[http://www.eclypsia.com/en/lol/news-2651.html EC‡LUNA REVEALED] ''"eclypsia.com"'' *September 6, [[El Muppo]] leaves.[http://team-winfakt.net/news/151/El-Muppo-back-in-the-family El Muppo, back in the family!]''"team-winfakt.net"'' * September 15, [[HawkDon RV]] leaves.[http://www.absolutelegends.net/news/2291/Hawkdon-leaves-Gamehopperseu Hawkdon leaves Gamehoppers.eu] ''"absolutelegends.net"'' *October 7, team disbands. {{TDRight/end}} == Player Roster == ===Former=== {|class="sortable wikitable" !
